Plaintiffs Notice Of Motions And Motions To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Pursuant To C.C.P. ? 2030.300 Et Seq.; Request For $2,385.00 In Sanctions Against Defendant City And County Of San Francisco
Off Calendar Jan-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PLAINTIFF NICHOLAS CASCIO'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Pursuant To C.C.P. 2030.300 Et Seq.; Request For $2,385.00 In Sanctions Against Defendant City And County Of San Francisco - Motion granted as to Form Interrogatory No. 12.2 and 15.1. Supplemental responses to be served by January 29, 2016. Request for sanctions is denied. The prevailing party is to provide a formal form of order and comply with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motions And Motions To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Pursuant To C.C.P. ? 2030.300 Et Seq.; Request For $2,385.00 In Sanctions Against Defendant City And County Of San Francisco

MINI MINUTES:

Atty. TIM FAMA, ESQ. of the Office of the City Attorney of San Francisco, Tel No. 415-554-3921 appearing for Defendant City and County of San Francisco.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco does not stipulate to the pro tem judge. Matter argued.
